---
title: 'Freedom Coaching - Coaching and Mentoring with Compassion and Wisdom'
date: '2025-01-12T05:51:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'The Freedom Center'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_page_id: '5846913213637171481'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Freedom Center/feed.atom'
---

<p>&nbsp;DRAFT</p><p><strong>Coaching and Mentoring with Compassion and Wisdom</strong><br />Our coaching and mentoring program offers a unique approach to personal growth and spiritual formation, grounded in these core principles:</p><ol><li><p><strong>Practical Guidance, Not Therapy</strong><br />Our coaches and mentors provide compassionate, practical support using trauma-informed, evidence-based techniques. While not licensed therapists, they are deeply committed to walking alongside you through life's challenges.</p></li><li><p><strong>Integrating Ancient Wisdom and Modern Psychology</strong><br />We draw on the Bible as ancient Near Eastern wisdom literature, coupled with modern psychological insights, to address the complexities of the human condition holistically.</p></li><li><p><strong>Spirit-Led Coaching</strong><br />We believe in the living, active work of God's Holy Spirit in the coaching process. Our approach leaves room for His voice to speak to you and through our coaches, offering wisdom, healing, and transformation beyond human understanding.</p></li><li><p><strong>Normalizing Professional Counseling</strong><br />We advocate for licensed therapy as a healthy and normal practice for everyone. For those who lack access to professional care, our coaching and mentoring program fills the gap with meaningful, supportive relationships.</p></li><li><p><strong>Fostering Growth and Resilience</strong><br />Our focus is on empowerment, helping you grow into the person God created you to be, rather than attempting to “fix” problems. We are here to support you in living out a biblical worldview and thriving in your unique context.</p></li></ol>
